title: woof language registry entry
description: Tool-side declaration at woof/languages/<lang>.toml. One file per supported language (python, typescript, rust, go, ...). Provides the install commands and verification snippets that just wf-preflight uses to satisfy a project's prerequisites.toml. Adding a new supported language = drop a TOML matching this schema into woof/languages/.

binary.description: LSP server binary name (pyright, tsserver, rust-analyzer, gopls).

binary_install.description: Single-line install command shown to the user when the binary is missing.

plugin.description: Claude plugin identifier providing the LSP integration. Optional when LSP works without a CC plugin.

plugin_install.description: Single-line plugin install command. Required when plugin is set.

gotchas.description: Per-language pitfalls shown alongside the install command in failed-preflight output. The preflight output IS the per-language documentation.

grammar_install.description: Single-line install command for the Tree-sitter grammar.

verify_snippet.description: Tiny syntactically-valid snippet of the language used by preflight to confirm the grammar parses correctly.

verify_scope.description: Tree-sitter scope name applied to verify_snippet (e.g., source.python, source.rust).
